message:
fcp-streaming: fix SseStream poll stall on fragmented chunks

SseStream::poll_next returned Poll::Pending after the inner chunk
stream returned Poll::Ready with a data chunk that did not complete an
SSE event boundary. Because the inner stream had returned Ready, no
waker was registered anywhere, so the consumer task stalled until an
unrelated wake happened. This triggered whenever a single SSE event
spanned multiple body chunks (large payloads, TCP segmentation).

Wrap the inner poll in a loop so we keep draining Ready chunks into
the parser until either an event dispatches, the inner stream parks
with a waker (Pending), or we hit EOF/error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
